name: FHI - Get Leads with user3 field filled up

content.query:
SELECT
lds.id as LeadID
,lds.cst_id as ProspectID
,lds.EntryDate
,lds.dsp_id
,lds.lds_user_3
,srs.Descr as SubSource
,lds.src_id as Source
FROM
ODS.LP_FHI_Lds_Leads lds
,[ODS].[LP_FHI_job_Jobs] job
,[ODS].[LP_FHI_srs_SourceSubs] srs
WHERE
lds.id = job.lds_id
and lds.lds_user_3 <> ''
and lds.dsp_id = 'Sale'
and lds.srs_id = srs.id
